title: Forward Industries moves $32M in SOL amid $1B paper loss
summary: Forward Industries moves $32M in SOL amid $1B paper loss
briefing: Forward Industries moved $31.9 million in SOL to Coinbase Prime as its Solana bet sits over 70% underwater, underscoring growing strain on corporate crypto treasuries.

title: South Korea police probe Polymarket users over illegal gambling claims: Report
summary: South Korea police probe Polymarket users over illegal gambling claims: Report
briefing: South Korean police reportedly launched the country’s first illegal gambling probe into local Polymarket users amid election-betting scrutiny.

title: Crypto billionaires bankroll Nigel Farage's pro-crypto party
summary: Crypto billionaires bankroll Nigel Farage's pro-crypto party
briefing: Tether-linked billionaire Christopher Harborne and BitMEX co-founder Ben Delo donated $9.4 million to Nigel Farage’s Reform UK in the first quarter.

title: Strategy’s leveraged Bitcoin model has faced its first stress test: Grayscale
summary: Strategy’s leveraged Bitcoin model has faced its first stress test: Grayscale
briefing: “Less Bitcoin on levered DAT balance sheets and more on diversified corporate balance sheets will be a positive,” said Grayscale’s head of research, Zach Pandl.

title: Anthropic says self-improving AI may be closer than expected
summary: Anthropic says self-improving AI may be closer than expected
briefing: Companies have been developing AI very quickly to stay ahead of the market, but Favaro and Clark argue that a slowdown would allow more time to deal with the technology’s implications.

title: ZEC drops 30% as Shielded Labs reveals more about infinite counterfeit bug
summary: ZEC drops 30% as Shielded Labs reveals more about infinite counterfeit bug
briefing: ZEC market capitalization fell by almost $3 billion over the past 24 hours following the disclosure of a critical vulnerability, despite it being patched already.

title: Senate Republicans push finance watchdogs to clarify crypto capital rules
summary: Senate Republicans push finance watchdogs to clarify crypto capital rules
briefing: Senator Cynthia Lummis has led a group of lawmakers urging financial regulators for “fair capital treatment for on-balance sheet treatment of digital assets.”

title: Comptroller says only Democrats pressuring over crypto trust charter
summary: Comptroller says only Democrats pressuring over crypto trust charter
briefing: US Comptroller of the Currency Jonathan Gould and New York Representative Gregory Meeks sparred over Donald Trump’s influence on regulators he has nominated as president at a Thursday oversight hearing.

title: Pump.fun's Latest Experiment Is Already Getting Weird
summary: Pump.fun's Latest Experiment Is Already Getting Weird
briefing: Pump.fun's GO bounty platform already has hundreds of listings following its pitch to let users “Pay ANYONE to do ANYTHING.”

title: ZEC Crashes 38% as Zcash Discloses ‘Critical Counterfeiting Vulnerability’
summary: ZEC Crashes 38% as Zcash Discloses ‘Critical Counterfeiting Vulnerability’
briefing: An Orchard vulnerability that allowed undetectable counterfeiting of ZEC in its shielded pool has reignited debate over privacy coins.

title: AI Is Already Developing AI, Says Anthropic—And Humans May Be Slowing Things Down
summary: AI Is Already Developing AI, Says Anthropic—And Humans May Be Slowing Things Down
briefing: Anthropic says AI now writes most of its code and runs increasingly complex research tasks, leaving people to decide which problems are worth solving.

title: Republican Lawmaker Plans to Add Prediction Markets to Congressional Stock Ban Bill
summary: Republican Lawmaker Plans to Add Prediction Markets to Congressional Stock Ban Bill
briefing: Rep. Bryan Steil said he'll add language to the House congressional stock ban bill to cover prediction markets like Polymarket and Kalshi.

title: 'Looksmaxxing' Trend Spawns $100M Gray Market Fueled By Bitcoin, Stablecoins: Chainalysis
summary: 'Looksmaxxing' Trend Spawns $100M Gray Market Fueled By Bitcoin, Stablecoins: Chainalysis
briefing: Demand for peptides fueled by the "looksmaxxing" trend has spawned a $100 million gray market paid for primarily with crypto.

title: Google DeepMind CEO Says AGI Is Coming Fast: 'We Don't Have Long to Prepare'
summary: Google DeepMind CEO Says AGI Is Coming Fast: 'We Don't Have Long to Prepare'
briefing: The Nobel Prize-winning AI researcher says humanity is standing in the "foothills of the singularity."

title: Strategy's Michael Saylor Blames 'Capital Rotation' Into AI as Bitcoin Dives 13%
summary: Strategy's Michael Saylor Blames 'Capital Rotation' Into AI as Bitcoin Dives 13%
briefing: With Bitcoin falling hard this week and down nearly 50% from peak. Strategy's Michael Saylor is pointing the finger at the AI boom.

title: Crypto Billionaires Donate $9.4M to Farage’s Reform UK in Q1
summary: Crypto Billionaires Donate $9.4M to Farage’s Reform UK in Q1
briefing: Tether investor Christopher Harborne and BitMEX co-founder Ben Delo’s outspent Britain's traditional political donors.
